item.title: DEBT: Replace four identical AI update enums with a single generic
item.intent: Four line-for-line identical enums is copy-paste debt that will diverge — one generic type eliminates the duplication and makes future changes atomic
item.description: ImproveWritingUpdate, SummarizeUpdate, ToneAdjustmentUpdate, and GhostTextUpdate in EMCore are structurally identical (token, completed, failed). Replace with a single generic: AIUpdate<Action: Sendable> with the same three cases. Use phantom types (ImproveWritingAction, SummarizeAction, ToneAdjustmentAction, GhostTextAction) for compile-time type safety at call sites. Update all consumers in EMAI and EMApp.
acceptanceCriteria: Only one AIUpdate<Action> enum exists in EMCore
Four phantom action types provide compile-time type safety
All AI streaming consumers in EMAI and EMApp compile and work correctly
No behavioral change to AI features
